steps.t: Erelas can be found north-east of Ost Rimmon. The Riders Three have asked you to meet them at the beacon-hill Erelas.
Burnoth, Hutha, and Ulf are at the beacon-hill Erelas. You have arrived at Erelas and should now speak to the Riders Three about the truth of Léofdag'…
The Riders Three can be found somewhere among the War-stead of the King's Men in Taur Drúadan. The Riders Three have asked you to join them in their q…
Burnoth is at his camp within the War-stead of the King's Men. You have arrived in Taur Drúadan and should now speak to Burnoth.
